steps.t: You have run outside the tavern with Ingild, and should speak with him quickly!
Horn, Nona, and Corudan are each somewhere in Elthengels. Help them drive off the Orcs!
You have driven off most of the Orcs, but some still remain within Elthengels. Defeat them and then find Ingild outside the Mead Hall at the top of th…
Thane Mildrith is outside the Mead Hall in Elthengels.
